info.name: Bro World API - Recruit General
info.description: Collection Postman copier-coller pour tous les endpoints Recruit General (V1). Inclut exemples de body et exemples de réponses attendues.

request.description: Liste publique paginée/filtrée des jobs publiés.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": "0195f9b4-7c29-7dd2-89f6-2f7d3ef2e9ac",
      "slug": "backend-engineer-lyon",
      "title": "Backend Engineer",
      "company": {
        "name": "BroWorld Tech",
        "logo": "https://cdn.example.com/logo.png",
        "sector": "Software",
        "size": "50-200"
      },
      "location": "Lyon",
      "contractType": "CDI",
      "workMode": "REMOTE",
      "schedule": "FULL_TIME",
      "experienceLevel": "SENIOR",
      "yearsExperienceMin": 4,
      "yearsExperienceMax": 8,
      "salary": {
        "min": 50000,
        "max": 65000,
        "currency": "EUR",
        "period": "year"
      },
      "postedAtLabel": "3d",
      "summary": "Build and maintain APIs",
      "matchScore": 82,
      "badges": ["Urgent", "Top company"],
      "tags": ["Symfony", "API"],
      "missionTitle": "Build scalable backend",
      "missionDescription": "Design robust microservices",
      "responsibilities": "Code reviews, mentoring",
      "profile": "Strong PHP/Symfony background",
      "benefits": "Remote, meal vouchers"
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 20,
    "totalItems": 1,
    "totalPages": 1
  },
  "meta": {
    "scope": "general",
    "filters": {
      "contractType": "CDI",
      "workMode": "Remote",
      "experienceLevel": "Senior",
      "location": "lyon",
      "q": "backend"
    }
  }
}

request.description: Retourne les jobs créés + jobs postulés par l'utilisateur connecté.

request.description: Liste brute des applicants du user (retour repository getArrayResult).
Liste privée des candidatures d'un job (owner requis).
Crée un CV avec attachement PDF (champ `document`).
